# Specs

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-11 -->

This directory holds implementation-level specs for active or recent work on `contentful/rich-text.php`.

Specs are small, focused documents that capture "what we're building now" — for both agents and humans. They are not ADRs (which capture *why* decisions were made) — they capture *what* is being built and *how*.

## Naming Convention

```
YYYY-MM-<short-description>.md
```

Example: `2026-05-new-node-type-xyz.md`

## When to add a spec

- New node type support (when it requires design decisions beyond the standard pattern)
- Changes to the public API (`ParserInterface`, `RendererInterface`, `NodeInterface`, etc.)
- New templating engine bridges
- Any change that requires coordination with `contentful/contentful.php` or other SDK repos

## Status markers

Add a status line near the top of each spec:

```
**Status:** Draft | In Progress | Done
```

Mark as `Done` when the feature ships — don't delete specs; they serve as historical context.
